description: The unavailable-behavioral-tier edge case: Tier 1 PASS, Tier 2 GREEN, and the behavioral harness was UNAVAILABLE (not installed / not on PATH), so Tier 3 is SKIPPED — never FAIL. A promotion run MUST NOT fail solely because the behavioral tier did not run. Final PASS, and the run MUST NOT report VERIFIED (absence of a behavioral failure is not evidence of behavioral correctness).
why: § 9 R15 (absence is SKIPPED, never FAIL) + R16 (SKIPPED caps at PASS, never VERIFIED) + § 6 R8. Algebraically identical to TB-009; the distinction is the SKIPPED *cause* (unavailable vs opt-out), which the spec says MUST yield the same final verdict.
